---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: Dylanchess0320
---

## What problem does this solve?
A clear description of what's missing or frustrating.

## Describe the solution you'd like
What should the feature do? How should it work from the user's perspective?

## Alternatives considered
Any workarounds or alternative approaches you've thought about.

## Additional context
Mockups, examples, related tools, or anything else that helps explain the idea.
